Package org.praxisplatform.uischema.stats.service.jpa

Class JpaStatsQueryExecutor

java.lang.Object
org.praxisplatform.uischema.stats.service.jpa.JpaStatsQueryExecutor
All Implemented Interfaces:
StatsQueryExecutor
public class JpaStatsQueryExecutor extends Object implements StatsQueryExecutor
JPA Criteria implementation for filtered stats.
